message.content:
I need to understand the current state of the Recipe Bottle build infrastructure for an e2e verification task. Find and report:

1. All conjure vessel definitions - look in Tools/rbw/ for vessel-related files, especially anything that lists vessels or vessel sigils. Check rbgc_Constants.sh for vessel constants.
2. The inscribe command - find the tabtarget for rubric inscribe (likely tt/rbw-RI.RubricInscribe.sh or similar) and read it to understand how to invoke it.
3. The current rbf_build function - read Tools/rbw/rbf_Foundry.sh to find the build dispatch function (the triggers.run path).
4. Check if there's a rubric repo URL configured - look in rbrr.env or regime files for RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL.

Report all findings concisely. Do NOT edit any files.

content.text: I'll search for all four items in parallel.

   158→######################################################################
   159→# External Functions (rbgc_*)
   160→
   161→# GCB machine type to vCPU mapping (default pool and private pool types).
   162→#
   163→# Provenance (verified 2026-02-13):
   164→#   Enum names from Cloud Build API BuildOptions.MachineType:
   165→#     https://cloud.google.com/dotnet/docs/reference/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1/latest/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1.BuildOptions.Types.MachineType
   166→#   That reference gives enum names and CPU counts for most types but
   167→#   describes UNSPECIFIED only as "Standard machine type" without a
   168→#   vCPU count.
   169→#
   170→#   The UNSPECIFIED=2 vCPU value was inferred from:
   171→#     1. Google web search result stating default is e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU)
   172→#     2. Empirical: with 10-CPU quota, two UNSPECIFIED builds started
   173→#        concurrently (impossible if >=6 vCPU each)
   174→#     3. Consistent with project's own RBRR comment and 5-concurrent
   175→#        builds observed at 10-CPU quota
   176→#   No single authoritative Google document was found that explicitly
   177→#   maps UNSPECIFIED to a vCPU count for the default pool.
   178→#
   179→# If Google adds new machine types, this function will hard-fail on
   180→# the unknown value, forcing an update here.
   181→rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture() {
   182→  zrbgc_sentinel
   183→  local z_machine_type="$1"
   184→  case "${z_machine_type}" in
   185→    UNSPECIFIED)    echo 2  ;;
   186→    E2_MEDIUM)      echo 1  ;;
   187→    E2_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   188→    E2_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   189→    N1_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   190→    N1_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   191→    E2_STANDARD_2)  echo 2  ;;
   192→    E2_STANDARD_4)  echo 4  ;;
   193→    E2_STANDARD_8)  echo 8  ;;
   194→    E2_STANDARD_16) echo 16 ;;
   195→    E2_STANDARD_32) echo 32 ;;
   196→    *) buc_die "Unknown GCB machine type: ${z_machine_type} — update rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture" ;;
   197→  esac
   198→}
   199→
   200→# eof

    54→  readonly ZRBF_TRIGGERS_URL="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GDC_REGION}/triggers"

    62→  readonly ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json,application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json,application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json"

   117→
   118→zrbf_stitch_build_json() {
   119→  zrbf_sentinel
   120→
   121→  buc_log_args 'Stitching trigger-compatible build JSON from step scripts'
   122→
   123→  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
   124→  test -s "${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded — call zrbf_load_vessel first"
   125→  test -s "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured — ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"
   126→
   127→  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
   128→  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
   129→  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
   130→  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   131→  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
   132→
   133→  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
   134→  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
   135→  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
   136→  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"
   137→
   138→  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
   139→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
   140→  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
   141→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
   142→  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
   143→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"
   144→
   145→  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
   146→  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
   147→  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")
   148→
   149→  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   150→  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   151→  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
   152→
   153→  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
   154→  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   155→  # Note: Step 05 (buildx-create) was merged into step 06 because Cloud Build
   156→  # steps run in isolated containers - builder state doesn't persist across steps
   157→  #
   158→  # OCI Layout Bridge pattern (steps 06-08):
   159→  # - Step 06: buildx exports to /workspace/oci-layout (no auth needed)
   160→  # - Step 07: crane pushes from oci-layout to GAR (with metadata auth)
   161→  # - Step 08: Syft analyzes from oci-layout (faster, more accurate)
   162→  # - Step 10: Assembles metadata JSON from .image_uri
   163→  # - Step 09: Builds and pushes metadata container (depends on step 10)
   164→  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
   165→  # Note: builder images pinned via RBRR_GCB_*_IMAGE_REF variables
   166→  local z_step_defs=(
   167→    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|derive-tag-base"
   168→    "rbgjb02-get-docker-token.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|get-docker-token"
   169→    "rbgjb03-docker-login-gar.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|docker-login-gar"
   170→    "rbgjb04-qemu-binfmt.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|qemu-binfmt"
   171→    "rbgjb06-build-and-export.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-export"
   172→    "rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|push-with-crane"
   173→    "rbgjb08-sbom-and-summary.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|sbom-and-summary"
   174→    "rbgjb10-assemble-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|assemble-metadata"
   175→    "rbgjb09-build-and-push-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-push-metadata"
   176→  )
   177→
   178→  local z_def=""
   179→  local z_script=""
   180→  local z_builder=""
   181→  local z_entrypoint=""
   182→  local z_id=""
   183→  local z_script_path=""
   184→  local z_body=""
   185→  local z_arg_flag=""
   186→  local z_body_file=""
   187→  local z_escaped_file=""
   188→  local z_steps_file=""
   189→  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
   190→
   191→  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
   192→  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
   193→
   194→  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
   195→    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
   196→    z_script_path="${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
   197→    z_body_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
   198→    z_escaped_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
   199→    z_steps_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
   200→

   406→rbf_build() {
   407→  zrbf_sentinel
   408→
   409→  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
   410→
   411→  # Documentation block
   412→  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel via trigger dispatch"
   413→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
   414→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   415→
   416→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"

   418→
   419→  # Load and validate vessel
   420→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
   421→
   422→  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
   423→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
   424→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"
   425→
   426→  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
   427→  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
   428→  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   429→
   430→  buc_log_args "Enforce vessel binfmt policy"
   431→  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY}" = "forbid"; then
   432→    if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}" != "${RBGC_DEFAULT_POOL_PLATFORM}"; then
   433→      buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' forbids binfmt but RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS='${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}' extends beyond Cloud Build runner platform (${RBGC_DEFAULT_POOL_PLATFORM})"
   434→    fi
   435→  fi
   436→
   437→  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
   438→
   439→  # Source Director RBRA for rubric repo URL
   440→  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
   441→  source "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
   442→  rbgu_check_rubric_repo_url "${RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL:-}"
   443→
   444→  # Authenticate as Director
   445→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   446→  local z_token=""
   447→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
   448→    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
   449→
   450→  # Verify GCB quota headroom before dispatch
   451→  buc_log_args "Check GCB quota headroom"
   452→  rbgd_check_gcb_quota "${z_token}"
   453→
   454→  # Resolve rubric repo HEAD via ls-remote (no clone needed — build only needs commit hash)
   455→  buc_step "Resolving rubric repo HEAD commit"
   456→  git ls-remote "${RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL}" HEAD > "${ZRBF_BUILD_RUBRIC_LS}" \
   457→    || buc_die "Failed to reach rubric repo — check RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL"
   458→  local z_rubric_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_RUBRIC_LS}")
   459→  test -n "${z_rubric_commit}" || buc_die "Rubric repo HEAD is empty — has inscribe been run?"
   460→  z_rubric_commit="${z_rubric_commit%%	*}"
   461→  buc_info "Rubric repo HEAD: ${z_rubric_commit:0:8}"
   462→
   463→  # Resolve trigger identity by direct GET (trigger name = trigger ID, set at create time)
   464→  buc_step "Resolving vessel trigger"
   465→  local -r z_trigger_name="${RBGC_RUBRIC_TRIGGER_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}"
   466→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${ZRBF_TRIGGERS_URL}/${z_trigger_name}" "${z_token}" "build_trigger_check"
   467→  local z_trigger_code=""
   468→  z_trigger_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "build_trigger_check") || z_trigger_code=""
   469→  test "${z_trigger_code}" = "200" \
   470→    || buc_die "Vessel trigger '${z_trigger_name}' not found (HTTP ${z_trigger_code}) — run rubric inscribe first"
   471→  buc_info "Trigger resolved: ${z_trigger_name}"
   472→
   473→  # Dispatch build via triggers.run — zero substitution overrides
   474→  buc_step "Dispatching trigger build for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
   475→  local -r z_run_url="${ZRBF_TRIGGERS_URL}/${z_trigger_name}:run"
   476→  jq -n --arg sha "${z_rubric_commit}" '{"source": {"commitSha": $sha}}' \
   477→    > "${ZRBF_BUILD_TRIGGER_BODY}" || buc_die "Failed to compose triggers.run body"
   478→
   479→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_run_url}" "${z_token}" "build_trigger_run" "${ZRBF_BUILD_TRIGGER_BODY}"
   480→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Trigger dispatch" "build_trigger_run"
   481→
   482→  # Extract build ID from Operation response
   483→  local z_build_id=""
   484→  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "build_trigger_run" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
   485→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in triggers.run response"
   486→  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
   487→
   488→  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
   489→  buc_info "Build dispatched: ${z_build_id}"
   490→  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
   491→
   492→  # Wait for completion (5s intervals, up to 80 minutes)
   493→  zrbf_wait_build_completion
   494→
   495→  buc_success "Vessel image built: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
   496→}

   528→rbf_delete() {
   529→  zrbf_sentinel
   530→
   531→  local z_locator="${1:-}"
   532→  local z_force="${2:-}"
   533→
   534→  # Documentation block
   535→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an image tag from the registry by locator"
   536→  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
   537→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
   538→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   539→
   540→  # Validate locator parameter
   541→  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
   542→
   543→  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
   544→  case "${z_locator}" in
   545→    *:*) : ;;
   546→    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
   547→  esac
   548→  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
   549→  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
   550→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
   551→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
   552→
   553→  # Check for --force flag
   554→  local z_skip_confirm=false
   555→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
   556→    z_skip_confirm=true
   557→  fi
   558→
   559→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   560→
   561→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
   562→  local z_token
   563→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   564→
   565→  # Confirm deletion unless --force
   566→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
   567→    buc_require "Will delete: ${z_locator}" "yes"
   568→  fi
   569→
   570→  buc_step "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   571→
   572→  # Delete by tag reference
   573→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   574→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   575→
   576→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
   577→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   578→    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
   579→    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
   580→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
   581→    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
   582→
   583→  local z_http_code
   584→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
   585→  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
   586→
   587→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   588→    buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_response_file}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
   589→    buc_die "Delete failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
   590→  fi
   591→
   592→  buc_success "Deleted or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
   593→}

   724→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}}"
   725→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|image"
   726→      # Check for -about suffix
   727→      elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" ]]; then
   728→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}}"
   729→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|about"
   730→      fi
   731→      # Skip tags that are neither (plain image tags)
   732→    done >> "${z_arks_raw}"
   733→  done < "${z_packages_list}"
   734→
   735→  # Correlate artifacts into arks
   736→  local z_arks_correlated="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_arks_correlated.txt"
   737→  sort "${z_arks_raw}" | awk -F'|' '
   738→    {
   739→      key = $1 "|" $2
   740→      if ($3 == "image") {
   741→        has_image[key] = 1
   742→      } else if ($3 == "about") {
   743→        has_about[key] = 1
   744→      }
   745→      seen[key] = 1
   746→    }
   747→    END {
   748→      for (k in seen) {
   749→        split(k, parts, "|")
   750→        vessel = parts[1]
   751→        consecration = parts[2]
   752→        image_mark = (has_image[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   753→        about_mark = (has_about[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   754→        printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n", vessel, consecration, image_mark, about_mark
   755→      }
   756→    }
   757→  ' | sort -k1,1 -k2,2r > "${z_arks_correlated}"
   758→
   759→  # Display header and results
   760→  printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n" "VESSEL" "CONSECRATION" "-image" "-about"
   761→  cat "${z_arks_correlated}"
   762→
   763→  buc_success "Beseech complete"
   764→}
   765→
   766→rbf_retrieve() {
   767→  zrbf_sentinel
   768→
   769→  local z_locator="${1:-}"
   770→
   771→  # Documentation block
   772→  buc_doc_brief "Pull an image from the registry to local container runtime by locator"
   773→  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (from rbf_list output)"
   774→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   775→
   776→  # Validate locator parameter
   777→  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
   778→
   779→  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
   780→  case "${z_locator}" in
   781→    *:*) : ;;
   782→    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
   783→  esac
   784→  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
   785→  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
   786→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
   787→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
   788→
   789→  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
   790→
   791→  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
   792→  local z_rbra_file=""
   793→  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
   794→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
   795→    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
   796→  else
   797→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   798→    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
   799→  fi
   800→
   801→  # Get OAuth token
   802→  local z_token
   803→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   804→
   805→  buc_step "Logging into container registry"
   806→
   807→  # Construct full image reference
   808→  local z_full_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_locator}"
   809→
   810→  # Docker login to GAR
   811→  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
   812→    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"
   813→
   814→  buc_step "Pulling image: ${z_full_ref}"
   815→
   816→  # Pull image
   817→  docker pull "${z_full_ref}" || buc_die "Image pull failed"
   818→
   819→  # Get local image ID
   820→  local z_image_id
   821→  z_image_id=$(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}' "${z_full_ref}" 2>/dev/null) \
   822→    || buc_die "Failed to get image ID"
   823→
   824→  # Display results
   825→  echo ""
   826→  echo "Image retrieved: ${z_full_ref}"
   827→  echo "Local image ID: ${z_image_id}"
   828→
   829→  buc_success "Image pull complete"
   830→}
   831→
   832→rbf_summon() {
   833→  zrbf_sentinel
   834→
   835→  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
   836→  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
   837→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
   838→
   839→  # Documentation block
   840→  buc_doc_brief "Summon an ark (pull both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
   841→  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
   842→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
   843→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   844→
   845→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
   846→  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
   847→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
   848→
   849→  buc_step "Authenticating for retrieval"
   850→
   851→  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
   852→  local z_rbra_file=""
   853→  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
   854→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
   855→    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
   856→  else
   857→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   858→    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
   859→  fi
   860→
   861→  # Get OAuth token
   862→  local z_token
   863→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   864→
   865→  # Construct ark tags
   866→  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   867→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
   868→
   869→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
   870→
   871→  # Check if -image artifact exists
   872→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_status.txt"
   873→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_response.json"
   874→
   875→  curl --head -s                                     \
   876→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
   877→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
   878→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
   879→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
   880→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
   881→    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
   882→
   883→  local z_image_http_code
   884→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
   885→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
   886→
   887→  local z_image_exists=false
   888→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
   889→    z_image_exists=true
   890→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
   891→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
   892→  fi
   893→
   894→  # Check if -about artifact exists
   895→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"
   896→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_response.json"
   897→
   898→  curl --head -s                                     \
   899→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
